name: redis
description: Protects Redis instances from destructive AI operations

smartRules.name: shield:redis:block-flushall
smartRules.reason: FLUSHALL deletes every key in every database — blocked by Redis shield

smartRules.name: shield:redis:block-flushdb
smartRules.reason: FLUSHDB deletes all keys in the current database — blocked by Redis shield

smartRules.name: shield:redis:block-config-resetstat
smartRules.reason: CONFIG RESETSTAT resets server statistics irreversibly — blocked by Redis shield

smartRules.name: shield:redis:review-config-set
smartRules.reason: CONFIG SET changes live server configuration and requires human approval (Redis shield)

smartRules.name: shield:redis:review-del-wildcard
smartRules.reason: Wildcard key deletion requires human approval (Redis shield)
